sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDGROUPID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE BOARDID = #v_REDIRECTBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT BOARDID, TABUSED, VIEWORDER FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards SET TABUSED = #tabUsed#, VIEWORDER = #viewOrder# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = 'everyone'

select.isEqual: SELECT BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , TABUSED FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (USERID = #v_USERID# OR USERID = 'everyone') ORDER BY VIEWORDER ASC

SELECT A.BoardID , A.BoardName , A.BoardName2 , TABUSED , B.Gubun FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ( USERID = #v_USERID# OR USERID = 'everyone' ) AND TABUSED = 'Y' ORDER BY VIEWORDER ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDGROUPID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#

select.isEqual: SELECT BOARDNAME FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDGROUPID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(BOARDNAME2, BOARDNAME) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDGROUPID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT NAME1 AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND LISTTYPE = #v_LISTCODE# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

isNotEmpty.isEqual: SELECT NAME1, NAME2, NAME3, NAME4, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND LISTTYPE = #v_LISTCODE# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT NAME$v_PSTRLANG$ AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND LISTTYPE = #v_LISTCODE# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT distinct boardID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT NAME1 AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

isNotEmpty.isEqual: SELECT NAME1, NAME2, NAME3, NAME4, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT NAME$v_PSTRLANG$ AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY WriteDate ASC ) rnum , COUNT(*) OVER ( ) imagecount , ImageID , FilePath , FileContent , main_Flag FLAG , ImageName FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# ) T1 WHERE rnum BETWEEN #v_pStartRow# AND #v_pEndRow#

SELECT ImageID , FilePath , FileContent , imagename , main_Flag FLAG FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# ORDER BY WriteDate ASC

select.isEmpty: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ItemID , A.StartDate , A.EndDate , A.Title , A.Attachments , A.Importance , B.BOARDID , B.BOARDNAME , B.BOARDNAME2 , A.Abstract , A.DocNo FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.BoardID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.WriterID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.StartDate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PENDROW#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT A.ITEMID, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.IMPORTANCE, B.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME, B.BOARDNAME2, A.ABSTRACT, A.DocNo FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.STARTDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ROWNUM <= #v_PENDROW# ORDER BY #v_PSORTBY#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) cnt FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT boardid, tenant_id FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.boardid JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON P.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND P.BoardID = B.boardid WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT userid FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_pUserID# AND itemid = A.itemid AND ReadDate > TO_DATE(SYSDATE - 5,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) ) AND A.StartDate < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.StartDate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 5,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.EndDate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ( A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )

SELECT NVL(LISTCOUNT, '20') LISTCOUNT , PREVIEW , PREVIEWWLIST , PREVIEWWCONTENT , PREVIEWHLIST , PREVIEWHCONTENT FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_Board_Configuration WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USERID = #id#
SELECT ITEMID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#

select.isNotEmpty: SELECT A.Title Title , GUBUN , A.BoardID BoardID , BOARDNAME , A.WriterName, A.WriterName2, A.CONTENTLOCATION FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.ItemID = #itemID#
select.isEmpty: SELECT BOARDID, CONTENTLOCATION FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT UserID, UserName$lang$ AS UserName, UserDeptName$lang$ AS UserDeptName, UserCompanyName$lang$ AS UserCompanyName, UserTitle$lang$ AS UserTitle, ReadDate FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND BoardID = #boardID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND ROWNUM <= 50 AND UserID NOT IN ( SELECT WRITERID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #itemID#) ORDER BY ReadDate DESC

SELECT ITEMID , BOARDID , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERNAME2 , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , WRITERDEPTNAME2 , WRITERCOMPANYID , WRITERCOMPANYNAME , WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , WRITEDATE , PARENTWRITEDATE , UPDATEDATE , IMPORTANCE , TITLE , CONTENTLOCATION , READCOUNT , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ABSTRACT , ATTACHMENTS , UPPERITEMIDTREE , ITEMLEVEL , COPIEDITEM , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE32 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , DOCNO , DOCPASSWORD , MAINCONTENT , NOTINO , TOPWRITERID , APPRFLAG , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_PORGITEMID# AND BOARDID = #v_PORGBOARDID#

select.isNotEmpty: SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM ( SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND ITEMID <> #v_PITEMID# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE NOT LIKE #v_PUPPERITEMIDTREE# || '%' AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ITEMID <> #v_PREVIOUSITEMID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, UPPERITEMIDTREE ASC, STARTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
select.isEmpty: SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM ( SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND ITEMID <> #v_PITEMID# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE NOT LIKE #v_PUPPERITEMIDTREE# || '%' AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, UPPERITEMIDTREE ASC, STARTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, B.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DocNo, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-5, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND S.USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND S.READDATE > (TO_DATE(SYSDATE-5, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))))) T1 WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, A.MAINCONTENT, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# $v_STRSQL$

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN N'0' ELSE N'1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ITEMID ) as ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID , TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# $v_STRSQL$

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate, A.WriteDate DESC ) ROWNUM_ ,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY A.NotiNo ASC, A.ParentWriteDate DESC, A.WriteDate DESC ) ROWNUM_ ,
A.BoardID , A.ItemID , A.WriterID , A.WriterName , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterCompanyName , A.StartDate , A.WriteDate , A.ParentWriteDate , A.Importance , A.Title , A.ReadCount , A.Attachments , A.ItemLevel , A.Abstract , '0' READFLAG , A.extensionAttribute5 , A.WriterName2 , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterCompanyName2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UpperItemIDTree , A.DocNo , A.extensionAttribute2 NOTICE , A.NotiNo , A.MainContent , A.extensionAttribute6 , A.extensionAttribute7 , A.extensionAttribute8 , A.extensionAttribute9 , A.extensionAttribute10 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1'
AND APPRFLAG = 'Y'
) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_START# AND #v_END#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate, A.WriteDate DESC ) ROWNUM_ , A.BoardID , A.ItemID , A.WriterID , A.WriterName , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterCompanyName , A.StartDate , A.WriteDate , A.ParentWriteDate , A.Importance , A.Title , A.ReadCount , A.Attachments , A.ItemLevel , A.Abstract , '0' READFLAG , A.extensionAttribute5 , A.WriterName2 , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterCompanyName2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UpperItemIDTree , A.DocNo , A.extensionAttribute2 NOTICE , B.BoardName BoardName , A.APPRFLAG APPRFLAG FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1' ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_START# AND #v_END#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT A.BoardID , A.ItemID , A.WriterID , A.WriterName , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterCompanyName , A.StartDate , A.WriteDate , A.ParentWriteDate , A.Importance , A.Title , A.ReadCount , A.Attachments , A.ItemLevel , A.Abstract , '0' READFLAG , A.extensionAttribute5 , A.WriterName2 , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterCompanyName2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UpperItemIDTree , A.DocNo , A.extensionAttribute2 NOTICE , B.BoardName BoardName , A.APPRFLAG APPRFLAG FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1' ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate, A.WriteDate DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE, A.APPRFLAG AS APPRFLAG FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) T1 WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS ROWNUM_, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN N'0' ELSE N'1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP A INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN N'0' ELSE N'1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST APPR ON A.BOARDID = APPR.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.APPRFLAG = 'N' AND APPR.APPRUSERID = #v_PUSERID# ) T1 WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#

SELECT A.BOARDID , A.APPRUSERID , B.DISPLAYNAME , B.DISPLAYNAME2 , B.DESCRIPTION , B.DESCRIPTION2 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUserMaster B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.APPRUSERID = B.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.DOCNO, A.MAINCONTENT, B.FILEPATH, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y' $v_STRSQL$

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.DOCNO, A.MAINCONTENT, B.FILEPATH, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE $v_PWHEREBOARD$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') $v_PSUBQUERY$ ) T1 WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW# $v_TEMP$

SELECT A.BoardID , A.ItemID , A.WriterID , A.WriterName , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterCompanyName , A.StartDate , A.WriteDate , A.ParentWriteDate , A.Importance , A.Title , A.ReadCount , A.Attachments , A.ItemLevel , A.Abstract , '0' READFLAG , A.extensionAttribute5 , A.WriterName2 , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterCompanyName2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UpperItemIDTree , A.DocNo , A.extensionAttribute2 NOTICE FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1' ORDER BY NOTINO DESC, A.ParentWriteDate ASC, A.WriteDate ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS ROWNUM_, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN N'0' ELSE N'1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, I.BOARDNAME, I.BOARDNAME2 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID WHERE $v_PWHEREBOARD$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') $v_PSUBQUERY$ ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN N'0' ELSE N'1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, I.BOARDNAME, I.BOARDNAME2, I.GUBUN AS GUBUN FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') $v_PSUBQUERY$ ) T1 WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ ) AS ROWNUM_, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN N'0' ELSE N'1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, I.BOARDNAME, I.BOARDNAME2, I.GUBUN AS GUBUN FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# $v_PSUBQUERY$ ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#
SELECT FILEPATH FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Attachments WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #orgItemID#

select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(REPLYID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID# AND USERID = #v_USERINFO_USERID#
select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(REPLYID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ITEMID , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERNAME2 , WRITERDEPTNAME , WRITERDEPTNAME2 , WRITERCOMPANYNAME , WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , WRITEDATE , PARENTWRITEDATE , IMPORTANCE , TITLE , CONTENTLOCATION , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ABSTRACT , ATTACHMENTS , UPPERITEMIDTREE , ITEMLEVEL , COPIEDITEM , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE32 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , MAINCONTENT , A.APPRFLAG , B.Gubun , extensionAttribute6 , extensionAttribute7 , extensionAttribute8 , extensionAttribute9 , extensionAttribute10 , A.BoardID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

SELECT ItemID , WriterID , WriterName , WriterName2 , WriterDeptName , WriterDeptName2 , WriterCompanyName , WriterCompanyName2 , WriteDate , ParentWriteDate , Importance , Title , ContentLocation , StartDate , EndDate , Abstract , Attachments , UpperItemIDTree , ItemLevel , copiedItem , ExtensionAttribute1 , ExtensionAttribute2 , ExtensionAttribute3 , ExtensionAttribute32 , ExtensionAttribute4 , ExtensionAttribute5 , MainContent , extensionAttribute6 , extensionAttribute7 , extensionAttribute8 , extensionAttribute9 , extensionAttribute10 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) cnt FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT boardid FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.boardid JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON P.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND P.BoardID = B.boardid WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT userid FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_pUserID# AND itemid = A.itemid AND ReadDate > utils.dateadd('DAY', -5, SYSDATE) ) ) AND A.StartDate < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.StartDate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 5,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.EndDate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ( A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )

SELECT distinct B.boardid FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.BOARDID = #boardId#

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID#

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #V_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
AND TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID#

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND FORMFLAG = 'Y' AND FORMLOCATION IS NOT NULL
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND FORMLOCATION IS NOT NULL

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ItemID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE UpperItemIDTree LIKE '%' || #itemID# || '%' AND ItemID <> #itemID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND APPRFLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND APPRFLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND APPRFLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND StartDate < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND EndDate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID#

SELECT distinct B.BOARDID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.BOARDID = #boardId#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < SYSDATE AND ENDDATE > SYSDATE AND B.Main_Flag = 'Y' AND A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < SYSDATE AND ENDDATE > SYSDATE AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL AND A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND B.Main_Flag = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(ACCESSID) cnt FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND READ_FG = 'FALSE' AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# AND BOARDID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# )
select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND WRITERID = #v_ACCESSID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A WHERE $v_PWHEREBOARD$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') $v_PSUBQUERY$

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) cnt FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1'

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') $v_PSUBQUERY$
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# $v_PSUBQUERY$
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND IMAGEID = #v_PIMAGEID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT apprflag FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards SET VIEWORDER = #count# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND ( USERID = #userID# OR USERID = 'everyone' )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND USERID = #userID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO SET VIEWORDER = ( SELECT VIEWORDER FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = '{FFFFFFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFFFFFFFFFF}' ) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO SET TABUSED = #v_TABUSED# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards SET TABUSED = #v_TABUSED# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT USERID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Configuration WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Configuration SET LISTCOUNT = #listCount#, PREVIEW = #preview#, PREVIEWWLIST = #previewWList#, PREVIEWWCONTENT = #previewWContent#, PREVIEWHLIST = #previewHList#, PREVIEWHCONTENT = #previewHContent# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId#

update.isEqual: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Configuration SET PREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#

UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Configuration SET PREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE#, PREVIEWWLIST = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWWCONTENT = #v_CONTENT#, ListCount = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#

UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Configuration SET PREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE#, PREVIEWHLIST = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWHCONTENT = #v_CONTENT#, ListCount = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#

select.isEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ItemID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = ( SELECT BoardID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# ) )
select.isNotEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ItemID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT WriterID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = ReadCount + 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET NOTINO = #sn# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET main_Flag = 'N' WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET main_Flag = 'Y' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ImageID = #v_IMAGEID# AND ItemID = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE ezBoardSTD.TBL_Board_Configuration SET ListCount = #v_LISTCOUNT#, PreView = #v_PREVIEW# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND UserID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET COPIEDITEM = 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #destItemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT APPRUSERID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND A.APPRUSERID = #v_USERID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'Y' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'C' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#

update.isNotEmpty: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET FilePath = #v_FilePath#, FileContent = #v_FileContent#, ImageName = #v_OFileName#, WriteDate = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ImageID = #v_ImageID# AND BoardID = #v_BoardID#
update.isEmpty: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET FileContent = #v_FileContent# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ImageID = #v_ImageID# AND BoardID = #v_BoardID#

sqlMap.update:
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET UpdateDate = #writeDate#, Importance = #importance#, Title = #title#,
ParentWriteDate = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),
ParentWriteDate = #parentWriteDate#,
StartDate = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),
StartDate = #startDate#,
EndDate = #endDate#, Abstract = #ABSTRACT#, Attachments = #attachments#, ExtensionAttribute1 = #extensionAttribute1#, ExtensionAttribute2 = #extensionAttribute2#, ExtensionAttribute3 = #extensionAttribute3#, ExtensionAttribute4 = #extensionAttribute4#, ExtensionAttribute5 = #extensionAttribute5#, DocPassWord = #docPassWord#, WriterName = #writerName#, WriterName2 = #writerName2#, ExtensionAttribute32 = #extensionAttribute32#, WriterDeptName = #writerDeptName#, WriterDeptName2 = #writerDeptName2#, WriterCompanyName = #writerCompanyName#, WriterCompanyName2 = #writerCompanyName2#, extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6#, extensionAttribute7 = #extensionAttribute7#, extensionAttribute8 = #extensionAttribute8#, extensionAttribute9 = #extensionAttribute9#, extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = 0 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND apprFlag = 'C' AND ItemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_Attachments WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ImageID = #v_ImageID# AND BoardID = #v_BoardID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDNAME FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
SELECT * FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID#
SELECT listcount , preview , previewwlist , previewwcontent , previewhlist , previewhcontent FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_CONFIGURATION WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_USERID#
SELECT * FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#

SELECT itemid ,title FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate = #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND upperitemidtree LIKE #v_PUPPERITEMIDTREE# || '%' AND startdate <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND enddate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY upperitemidtree, startdate DESC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT itemid , title FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND enddate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY parentwritedate ASC, upperitemidtree , startdate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM (SELECT itemid ,title FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND enddate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, startdate DESC, docno DESC, upperitemidtree ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM (SELECT itemid , title FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND enddate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, startdate DESC, docno DESC, upperitemidtree ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT COUNT(itemid) cnt FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardId# AND startdate <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND enddate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND extensionattribute1 = '0' AND extensionattribute2 = '1'

SELECT COUNT(B.appruserid) AS cnt FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.itemid = #v_PITEMID# AND B.appruserid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT COUNT(boardid) FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE boardid = #boardID# AND background = 'Y'

SELECT replyid, $v_UserName$ as username, userid, content, writedate FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BoardID# AND itemid = #v_ItemID# ORDER BY writedate ASC
SELECT COUNT(replyid) FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND replyid = #v_ReplyID# AND userid = #v_UserID#

SELECT COUNT(B.appruserid) FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.itemid = #v_PITEMID# AND B.appruserid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT parentboardid FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
SELECT docpassword FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
SELECT COUNT(itemid) FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND writerid = #userID# AND startdate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST A JOIN ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.appruserid = #id# AND B.apprflag = 'N' AND B.startdate <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND B.enddate > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
sqlMap.update: UPDATE ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM SET copieditem = 1 WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #destItemID#
UPDATE ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM SET title = #v_TITLE#, maincontent = #v_CONTENT# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID# AND itemid = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP SET title = #v_TITLE#, maincontent = #v_CONTENT# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID# AND itemid = #v_ITEMID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
